ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_3166" TEXT /* ISO 3166 code for the country */,
  "alpha_2" TEXT /* Alpha-2 code for the country */,
  "alpha_3" TEXT /* Alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mobile_country_codes" (
  "mcc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mobile country code */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the MCC belongs to */,
  "mcc" INTEGER /* Mobile country code */,
  "coverage_area" TEXT /* Geographic area covered by the MCC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mcc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobile_country_codes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mobile_network_codes" (
  "mnc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mobile network code */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the MNC belongs to */,
  "mnc" INTEGER /* Mobile network code */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network (e.g., GSM, CDMA, LTE) */,
  "band" TEXT /* Frequency band used by the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mnc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobile_network_codes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mobile_network_operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mobile network operator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the operator belongs to */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the mobile network operator */,
  "mnc" INTEGER /* Mobile network code of the operator */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the operator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobile_network_operators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "remarks" (
  "remark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each remark */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the remark belongs to */,
  "remark" TEXT /* Remark for the country or mobile network code */,
  "remark_type" TEXT /* Type of remark (e.g., warning, info, error) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the remark was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("remark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_remarks_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, operator, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the information */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operator_countries" (
  "operator_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator-country relationship */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the operator operates in */,
  "operation_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the operator started operating in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operator_countries_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operator_countries_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES mobile_network_operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_codes" (
  "network_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network code */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator */,
  "mnc" INTEGER /* Mobile network code */,
  "network_code_type" TEXT /* Type of network code (e.g., GSM, CDMA, LTE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_codes_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES mobile_network_operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_network_codes" (
  "country_network_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country-network code relationship */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "mnc" INTEGER /* Mobile network code */,
  "network_code_type" TEXT /* Type of network code (e.g., GSM, CDMA, LTE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_network_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_network_codes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
